title: HEM Incense sticks PRECIOUS LILY Full box of 6 with DHS incense stick holder for Yoga, Meditation, Healing, Spirituality, Aromatherapy, Incense Spa and Relaxation……
features: Precious Lily incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual Therapy, Positivity, Relaxation and much more.

Hem Precious Lily Manufactured in India. Hem provides traditionally luxury handcrafted incense in beautiful fragrant scents. Prepared using only the highest quality and purest of ingredients provided by nature, that are free from chemicals and are ethically sourced.
The pack includes 6 unique and premium fragrance of Precious Lily and also comes with DHS incense stick holder
description: Enter the world of a million small white blooms with evocative fragrances. A mild scent that is infinitely desirable. HEM Precious Jasmine incense sticks have calming therapeutic properties that soothe the mind and the body. HEM Precious Lily incense sticks are widely used in aromatherapy for pain and healing to rejuvenate your body and soul. It is also commonly used for Home fragrance, Meditation and in Spa.
